attacking_style: Thrives in breakaways with tactical precision, attacking inside final 1-3km on medium gradients (6-7%). Calculates time bonuses and GC gaps exactly, launching late-positioned accelerations rather than long-range moves.
team_tactics: Functions as elite climbing domestique capable of destructive pacing that isolates GC contenders. When given freedom, exploits breakaways rather than attacking from GC groups. Team occasionally shows confusion on whether to deploy him as leader or domestique.
terrain_preference: Punchy summit finishes and medium-gradient climbs (6-7%) suit him best, evidenced by Flèche Wallonne 5th and breakaway wins. Strong ITT capacity when in form. Struggles with sustained high-tempo climbing and early aggressive selections.
vulnerability: Dropped early when sustained high-tempo pacing begins (15km+ efforts). Form inconsistency notable between 2020 peak and 2023 underperformance. Limited ability to resist relentless diesel pacing despite own pacing prowess.
key_patterns: Breakaway specialist who calculates time bonuses precisely, stealing GC via accumulated seconds not mountain dominance (2020 Dauphiné).
Elite climbing domestique capable of pacing so hard only team leader survives, destroying GC fields (Giro 2021).
Bridges to long-range attacks rather than initiating them, showing tactical patience (Pogačar bridge 2022 Tour).
Stronger in punchy finishes than sustained efforts, dropped when high tempo starts 15km+ out repeatedly.
Diesel recovery capacity proven multiple times, rejoining after early splits via chase efforts.
ITT capability variable: Colombian champion credentials versus 40-second losses suggesting form dependency rather than consistent TT strength.
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 performances show early dropping on tempo efforts and ITT results not matching palmares, significant decline from 2020-2022 peak where he won from breaks and bridged to Pogačar
